rows.label: qev041901_MSG0001
rows.name:
As expected, this shop's incredibly stiff wedding dress... is the best, mo.
I want to find a way to let Popo wear it, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0002
rows.name:
But that Ntoto is not arriving at all...
And I do not think I can buy it with the money I have on hand...
Aaah, what should I do, mo!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0003
rows.name:
You are a merchant too, right, mo?
When buying, do not hesitate; make an immediate decision, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0004
rows.name:
Above all, this is a popular dress, mo.
If you hesitate like that, it will sell out in an instant, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0005
rows.name:
Ugh... Nngh...
If it comes to this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Hey, you there?
Nio is not a suspicious Nopon, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0007
rows.name: I am a respectable business owner running Nio Necessities at the caravan in the Black Steel Continent, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0008
rows.name:
So... I want you to lend me money, mo!
I have a way to pay it back, I will absolutely return it, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_JNK0010
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: qev041901_SEL0011
rows.name: Keep your wallet closed around the suspiciously acting Nopon.

rows.label: qev041901_JNK0020
rows.name: Listen

rows.label: qev041901_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask to hear his circumstances, just in case.

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0090
rows.name:
You are a cautious person, mo...
From the looks of you, I thought you would be more easygoing, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0009
rows.name:
But please, at least hear out my story, mo.
There are desperate circumstances behind this, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0010
rows.name: Actually, Nio is planning to marry a super cute girl named Popo here, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0011
rows.name:
Ooh... Is there a chance, mo?
You seem like a very good person, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0012
rows.name: If a complete stranger suddenly asked Nio to lend them money, Nio would refuse with all his might, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0013
rows.name:
So please listen to my story, mo.
Nio is planning to marry a super cute girl named Popo here, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0014
rows.name: And so, I want to present her with the super gorgeous wedding dress from this shop, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0015
rows.name: The friend who is transporting all of Nio's assets and the wedding ring over here has not arrived yet, and I am in trouble, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0016
rows.name:
So... I beg you, mo!
Please lend me 20,000 credits, mo!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0017
rows.name: Popo is the daughter of a very wealthy family, so if I do not give her a splendid wedding dress, Nio... will surely be considered a failure, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0018
rows.name: Well then, please talk to Nio once you have gathered the money, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0019
rows.name:
Do not worry, as soon as my friend Ntoto arrives, I can pay back this much immediately, mo.
So there is nothing to worry about, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0020
rows.name:
Have you gathered the money yet, mo?
I want you to bring it before this super cute dress sells out, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0021
rows.name:
*Sniff* *Sniff*... I smell money, mo.
Have you gathered the 20,000 credits, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0022
rows.name:
Yes... I have definitely borrowed exactly 20,000 credits, mo.
Then I will stamp my seal on this IOU... and here, take this, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0023
rows.name:
To Nopon, contracts are absolute, mo.
If you break a contract, you can no longer stay in the caravan, and your life is over, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0024
rows.name: So please rest easy and wait until Ntoto brings the money, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_JNK0030
rows.name: Trust

rows.label: qev041901_SEL0031
rows.name: Trust Nio.

rows.label: qev041901_JNK0040
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev041901_SEL0041
rows.name: Express that you cannot trust him based on a single scrap of paper.

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0025
rows.name:
I am happy you believe in me, mo.
When Ntoto brings the money, I will treat you to a delicious meal, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0026
rows.name: You have already made the contract, so brooding over it is useless, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0027
rows.name:
...Alright, then, lady!
I am buying the stiff dress, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0028
rows.name:
Got it. Well then... how does this sound, mo?
It is a massive discount price to celebrate your wedding, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0029
rows.name:
Gack...! That is way too expensive, mo!!
You are off by about two digits, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0030
rows.name: What is this? A man trying to marry the young lady Popo is getting scared over a price like this, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0031
rows.name: Such a petty man will be dumped by the young lady in no time, mo~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0032
rows.name:
Nngh...! Nio is a big Nopon, mo!
Just wait right there, mo...!
I really did not want to owe that guy, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0033
rows.name:
I will go borrow money from Jalolo, mo!
You, Earthling, I want you to come along as a witness, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0034
rows.name: When I asked Jalolo to lend me money, he suddenly hurled abuse at me, saying he has no money to lend to a worm like Nio, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0035
rows.name:
Did Nio do something bad, mo?
He is always an unpleasant guy, but... he seems especially irritated today, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0036
rows.name: ...If it is alright, I would like you to try speaking to him too, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0037
rows.name: Ah, the person who lent me money![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0038
rows.name:
Did you come all the way to check on me, mo?
I got ripped off, but I was able to buy the dress properly, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0039
rows.name:
However, I was planning to give it to her as a surprise, but now Popo has found out about it, mo.
It is somewhat embarrassing, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0040
rows.name:
Nio, this is no time for that, mo!
All of your assets... have disappeared, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0041
rows.name: ...Huh? Ntoto was supposed to pack them on the Nopopotamus and bring them here along with the ring...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0042
rows.name: During the journey... Ntoto was resting the Nopopotamus by the lakeside and dozed off, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0043
rows.name: And when he woke up... the Nopopotamus had been killed by someone, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0044
rows.name:
The luggage seems to have all been taken by some hyenas or something and is missing.
The ring tied to its teeth was gone too, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0045
rows.name: ...More importantly, is it true that you borrowed money from that wicked Jalolo, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0046
rows.name:
Ah... yes...
And I borrowed from this person as well...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_JNK0050
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev041901_SEL0051
rows.name: Express concern that he might not be able to repay the debts.

rows.label: qev041901_JNK0060
rows.name: Insist

rows.label: qev041901_SEL0061
rows.name: Demand that he return the money.

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0047
rows.name: No way... Nio worked so hard to save up money for this day...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0048
rows.name: Even if you say that, Nio has no money on hand...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0049
rows.name:
Gehyahyayahya!
I heard it, I heard it! This is hilarious, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0050
rows.name:
Hey! Look at this contract, mo!
If you cannot pay the money, I am taking all the hair on your head right now! Rip it out and hand it over, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0051
rows.name:
How could you!
The hair on one's head is the very pride of a Nopon...
Trying to snatch that away is pure evil, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0052
rows.name: Young lady, you call it the pride of a Nopon, but this guy is the one who signed the contract, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0053
rows.name:
If you are a merchant's daughter, you understand what that means, mo.
If you break a contract, you are banished from the caravan and can never do business among Nopon for the rest of your life, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0054
rows.name:
Hehe, Jalolo is fine with either outcome.
Well, decide how you are going to settle this by the due date, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0055
rows.name:
I-I am sorry, mo...
Nio just wanted Popo to wear this beautiful dress... and so...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0056
rows.name:
I do not care about a dress like that...
As long as Popo can be with you, she does not need anything else, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0057
rows.name:
...But this is a problem, mo.
That contract from earlier was definitely official.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0058
rows.name: If Nio does not pay the money, things will end up just as Jalolo said, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_JNK0070
rows.name: Assist

rows.label: qev041901_SEL0071
rows.name: Offer to front the money for him.

rows.label: qev041901_JNK0080
rows.name: Concede

rows.label: qev041901_SEL0081
rows.name: Say that there is no choice but to give up and hand over the hair.

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0059
rows.name: However... looking at that contract, it was strictly phrased that the payment must come from Nio's own money, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0060
rows.name:
Jalolo definitely lent Nio the money hoping for this outcome, mo.
He is truly... a despicable guy, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0061
rows.name:
We have no choice but to try a different approach, mo.
I wonder if there is any good idea... mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0062
rows.name: I think it is difficult for Earthlings to understand, but our hair is not something we can hand over so easily...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0063
rows.name: ...Ah![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0064
rows.name:
Nio! Popo just had a flash of inspiration, mo!
That is right, you just have to hand over your hair, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0065
rows.name:
What are you saying, mo!
Popo, you yourself said this is the pride of a Nopon, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0066
rows.name: Besides, Popo's family will never approve of a marriage to a Nopon with no hair...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0067
rows.name: Hehe. We just have to make a fake one and hand that over instead, right, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0068
rows.name: It is true that the contract stated the returned money must belong to Nio, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0069
rows.name: However, where did it say that the hair cannot be a fake, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_JNK0090
rows.name: Applaud

rows.label: qev041901_SEL0091
rows.name: Stand in awe of Popo's quick thinking.

rows.label: qev041901_JNK0100
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev041901_SEL0101
rows.name: Doubt whether such a simple trick will work.

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0070
rows.name:
Your words were the catalyst for this, mo.
Thank you, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0071
rows.name:
A twisted Nopon like that is different from a truly intelligent person like you.
The simpler the lie, the less likely they are to see through it, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0072
rows.name: ...Yes! Now that it is decided, let's gather the materials for the hair right away, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0073
rows.name: Earthling, would it be alright to ask for your help too, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0074
rows.name: The necessary materials are Hitsujamo and Antorus Roses... mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0075
rows.name: Well then, let's all protect Nio's hair together, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0076
rows.name:
Popo is amazing, mo...
Somehow, I feel like I do not deserve her, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0077
rows.name:
But... I absolutely want to marry her, mo.
Please, gather the materials for the hair, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0078
rows.name:
Ugh...
Jalolo came by again earlier to make sarcastic remarks, mo.
My tummy hurts, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0079
rows.name:
Have the materials for the hair not been gathered yet, mo?
I need you to somehow obtain them before the repayment date, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0081
rows.name:
Ooh! This texture...
It is exactly like Nio's hair, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0082
rows.name: ...Popo, can you make fake hair with this, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0083
rows.name:
Yes! Please leave it to me, mo!
I will make a wig with hair immediately, and we shall put it on and go see that man.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0084
rows.name:
Understood, mo! [ST:playername ]!
I want you to come to Jalolo's place too, mo.
I want you to witness Nio's grand performance, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_JNK0110
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev041901_SEL0111
rows.name: Nod and say you will go watch.

rows.label: qev041901_JNK0120
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: qev041901_SEL0121
rows.name: Brush him off, saying they can handle the rest themselves.

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0085
rows.name:
Both you and Popo are much too kind, mo.
With the power of these bonds, I am sure we can overcome this, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0086
rows.name:
Please do not say such cold things, mo.
I do not know what will happen if the lie is exposed, so I want you by my side, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0087
rows.name:
Popo also asks this of you, mo.
Of course, we will also provide compensation, so please take care of it, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0088
rows.name: That sparkly blue ring was a very rare item, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0089
rows.name: I do not know if I can find the exact same one, but... I will work very, very hard to earn money and present it to Popo, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041901_JNK0130
rows.name: Give

rows.label: qev041901_SEL0131
rows.name: Hand over 20,000 credits.

rows.label: qev041901_JNK0140
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: qev041901_SEL0141
rows.name: Decide to back out.

rows.label: qev041901_MSG0091
rows.name:
Do not be mean, mo.
Please lend Nio that money before the dress sells out, mo.[ST:wait ]
